# CWE-648: Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-648-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const uploadRoot = "/var/app/uploads"

// Safe: ownership changes are restricted to files under a controlled upload root.
func AssignFileOwner(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.PostForm("filename")
	clean := filepath.Clean(name)
	full := filepath.Join(uploadRoot, clean)
	if !filepath.HasPrefix(full, uploadRoot) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"file": full, "owner": "app"})
}
